title: Browser and live API parity/fallback scenarios

browser: answer and resume (POST resolve, reload, gate cleared)
stale migrated gate join falls back to legacy prompt/options
canonical pause/circuit label is visible in the browser
live_api: Oracle fail -> REPAIRING -> Oracle pass -> COMPLETED

verification.command: npm --prefix web run test:e2e -- web/e2e/plan-approval.spec.ts web/e2e/mission-read-model-parity.spec.ts

verification.result: PASS; tsc and Vite production build completed

verification.command: PYTHONPATH=src AGENT_LAB_MOCK_AGENTS=1 .venv/bin/pytest -q tests/test_mission_read_model.py tests/test_mission_read_model_api.py tests/test_mission_read_model_wave_b.py tests/test_mission_dual_write.py tests/test_mission_dual_write_verify.py tests/test_human_inbox.py tests/test_room_disconnect_inbox_guard.py

verification.result: PASS; live health ok=true and read-model returned migrated=true, source=mission_journal, state=VERIFYING, operational_status=RUNNING, work_phase=merge_verify, event_cursor=6, inbox_summary pending_count=0

manual_qa.browser_observed: 13 combined plan/read-model tests passed with no page errors in fallback cases; migrated question retained both options and cleared after answer + reload; stale gate join retained legacy prompt/options; canonical pause label visible
manual_qa.api_surface: real uvicorn process on 127.0.0.1:8876 with curl GET /api/health and GET /mission/read-model
manual_qa.api_observed: HTTP 200 JSON was non-empty and reported migrated journal source plus normalized operational/work phase
manual_qa.cleanup: uvicorn stopped with SIGINT; port 8876 confirmed free; Playwright server exited; no temporary fixture or browser process retained

adversarial_classes.malformed_input: N/A for browser fixtures; malformed run/journal boundaries are covered by existing mission verifier/audit tests in the targeted suite
adversarial_classes.stale_state: covered by fallback reload and answer/resume gate-clear assertions
adversarial_classes.dirty_worktree: pre-existing Wave B edits preserved; only three test files plus this evidence artifact added by this task
adversarial_classes.misleading_success_output: live curl body inspected for migrated/source/state/summary fields, not status code alone
adversarial_classes.flaky_tests: combined Playwright run passed 11/11; Vitest 158/158; Python 107/107
adversarial_classes.cancel_resume: N/A; reconnect/answer-resume covered, no cancel mutation introduced
adversarial_classes.generated_artifact: N/A; tests use in-memory route fixtures and tmp_path sessions
adversarial_classes.mid_operation_interruption: browser read-model request abort exercises reconnect fallback; no long-running writer added
adversarial_classes.prompt_injection: N/A; fixture prompts are static test data

risks: Browser tests stub API responses to deterministically exercise migrated/legacy/error branches; the separate live curl checks the running backend route but not a full browser against production data.
The read-model UI remains reversible behind AGENT_LAB_MISSION_UI_READ_MODEL and keeps legacy payload fallback; no writer or bridge was removed.
